queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a determinant of default and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: The impact of lacking a checking account as a credit risk driver contributing to higher loan default probability.
Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a mitigating factor in credit risk determinants that reduces default likelihood.
